sections.paragraph:
εὐμάρεια (εὐμάρεια, ἡ,)

1. easiness, ease, opportunity, τινος for doing a thing, Soph.

2. ease of movement, dexterity, Eur.

3. of condition, ease, comfort, εὐμαρείᾳ χρῆσθαι to be at ease, in comfort, Soph.; but also, εὐμαρίῃ χρᾶσθαι euphem. for alvum exonerare, to ease oneself, Hdt.; εὐμ. πρός τι provision for, protection against, Plat.


Etym. from εὐμᾰρής
